_comment: Home-scout cron jobs. The upsert-jobs.py script merges these into /home/openclaw/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json keyed by 'name'. Pi TZ is America/Chicago — cron expressions are interpreted there.

jobs.name: home-scout-daily
jobs.description: Daily Zillow 78759 saved-search scan. Reads digest emails via gog, runs housing math, scores by neighborhood tier, sends ntfy push for Tier 1-2, posts Matrix digest. Runs at 08:00 America/Chicago — ~30 min after Zillow's typical morning email.

payload.message: Load workspace/HOME.md, then execute workspace/skills/home-scout/SKILL.md exactly as written. Budget: 5 turns, 90s wall. No synthesis beyond the digest format the skill prescribes.
